vocabulary.definition_tw: 與「依賴」相關的常用片語
vocabulary.example: The phrase 'dependency for writing' is useful when discussing study, work, or academic topics.
vocabulary.usage_note_tw: 此項目作為 TOEFL/IELTS 與日常商務表達的可抽取詞彙或片語。

vocabulary.definition_tw: 含義；影響
vocabulary.example: The implication of the study is that short daily practice works.
vocabulary.usage_note_tw: 推論題常考。

vocabulary.definition_tw: 協商
vocabulary.example: Professionals often negotiate deadlines in international teams.
vocabulary.usage_note_tw: 商務社交高頻。

grammar_focus.title: Using 'The main reason is that...'
grammar_focus.explanation_tw: 當有多個理由時，用 The main reason is that 聚焦核心論點。
grammar_focus.pattern: The main reason is that S + V.
grammar_focus.example_basic: The main reason is that I need feedback on pronunciation.
grammar_focus.example_advanced: The main reason is that structured review helps me retain academic vocabulary longer.

reading.title: Communication in Professional Settings
reading.text: In today's global workplace, professionals must communicate clearly across cultures and time zones. Team members often collaborate on projects while managing demanding schedules, so precise language matters. Today's vocabulary introduces expressions such as 'dependency for writing', 'implication', 'negotiate', and 'conclusion in context'; each one can help learners explain work, travel, or cultural situations with more confidence. When presenting ideas, speakers should connect their message to relevant examples. It is also crucial to remain calm during discussions and respond to feedback constructively. Managers may negotiate deadlines or resources, so employees need flexible communication skills. A clear meeting agenda helps groups allocate time and stay focused on relevant priorities. Although challenges are inherent in international teams, shared goals can improve collaboration across departments. Expressions like 'global approach', 'invest a response', and 'key component' are useful because they allow professionals to summarize decisions, ask follow-up questions, and reduce misunderstandings before a project moves forward. Companies that invest in language training frequently report smoother negotiations and stronger relationships with overseas partners. As a result, communication training is no longer optional for ambitious professionals in competitive industries.
reading.translation_tw: 在今日全球職場中，專業人士必須跨文化與跨時區清楚溝通。團隊成員常在管理繁忙行程的同時合作專案。報告想法時，說話者應以相關例子傳達訊息。討論中保持自信並建設性回應回饋也至關重要。主管可能協商截止日期或資源，因此員工需要有效的溝通技巧。清楚的會議議程有助團隊分配時間並保持專注。雖然國際團隊挑戰固有，共同目標能促進合作。因此，投資語言培訓的公司常見團隊合作與客戶關係的顯著改善。

listening_speaking.sentence: In today's global workplace, professionals must communicate clearly across cultures and time zones.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 注意功能詞的連音與重音位置，先慢速再加速。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 先聽一次，再逐句跟讀，最後不看文字朗讀。

listening_speaking.sentence: Team members often collaborate on projects while managing demanding schedules, so precise language matters.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 留意 and、to、of 等虛詞的弱化發音。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 先慢速跟讀兩遍，再加速至正常語速。

listening_speaking.sentence: Today's vocabulary introduces expressions such as 'dependency for writing', 'implication', 'negotiate', and 'conclusion in context'; each one can help learners explain work, travel, or cultural situations with more confidence.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 句尾語調略下降，表示陳述句結束。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 分段練習後，最後整句連貫朗讀一次。

toefl_skill_drill.instruction_tw: 請依今日所學完成一題 TOEFL 導向練習，口說 45 秒或寫 3–4 句。
toefl_skill_drill.prompt: How would you use 'dependency for writing' in a TOEFL speaking answer about Social Communication Skills?
toefl_skill_drill.response_framework: I believe ___. One reason is that ___. For example, ___. As a result, ___.
toefl_skill_drill.sample_answer: I believe daily practice is essential. One reason is that it builds dependency for writing over time. For example, I review vocabulary every morning before work. As a result, I feel more prepared for academic tasks.

daily_quiz.question: Which definition best matches 'dependency for writing'?
options: A. 與「依賴」相關的常用片語
D. 與「結論」相關的常用片語
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 今日單字 dependency for writing 的解釋為「與「依賴」相關的常用片語」。

daily_quiz.question: What is the main idea of today's reading?
options: A. Effective learning requires consistent, structured practice.
B. Cramming once a week is the best method.
C. Vocabulary lists alone guarantee a high score.
D. Test preparation should avoid speaking practice.
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 文章強調有限時間下，持續且結構化的練習才能帶來進步。

daily_quiz.question: Which sentence uses today's grammar pattern correctly?
options: A. I like English. Because it is useful.
B. In my opinion, practice helps. One reason is that it builds fluency.
D. English hard but I try.
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 選項 B 正確運用 In my opinion... One reason is that... 句型。

gmail_email.subject: Day 6 英文學習｜Social Communication Skills
gmail_email.html_body:
Day 6 英文學習

今日主題：Social Communication Skills

階段：Foundation · 程度：B1+ · 預估：15 分鐘

今日訓練：Mixed TOEFL mini practice

今日單字

單字音標解釋狀態
dependency for writing與「依賴」相關的常用片語新詞
implication/ˌɪmplɪˈkeɪʃən/含義；影響新詞
negotiate/nɪˈɡoʊʃieɪt/協商新詞
conclusion in context與「結論」相關的常用片語新詞
global approach與「全球的」相關的常用片語新詞
invest a response與「投資」相關的常用片語新詞
key component與「組成部分」相關的常用片語新詞
key logic與「邏輯」相關的常用片語新詞
mutual in daily communication與「相互的」相關的常用片語新詞
ambitious in academic writing與「有企圖心的」相關的常用片語新詞
available response與「可取得的」相關的常用片語新詞
mode in context與「模式」相關的常用片語新詞
highly considerable與「相當大的」相關的常用片語新詞
ambitious有企圖心的新詞
highly mature與「成熟的」相關的常用片語新詞
academic finance與「財務；金融」相關的常用片語複習
considerable in academic writing與「相當大的」相關的常用片語複習
mutual evidence與「相互的」相關的常用片語複習
introduce/ˌɪntrəˈduːs/介紹；引進複習
feature development與「特色；特徵」相關的常用片語複習

文法重點

Using 'The main reason is that...'

當有多個理由時，用 The main reason is that 聚焦核心論點。

The main reason is that S + V.

The main reason is that structured review helps me retain academic vocabulary longer.

閱讀：Communication in Professional Settings

In today's global workplace, professionals must communicate clearly across cultures and time zones. Team members often collaborate on projects while managing demanding schedules, so precise language matters. Today's vocabulary introduces expressions such as 'dependency for writing', 'implication', 'negotiate', and 'conclusion in context'; each one can help learners explain work, travel, or cultural situations with more confidence. When presenting ideas, speakers should connect their message to relevant examples. It is also crucial to remain calm during discussions and respond to feedback constructively. Managers may negotiate deadlines or resources, so employees need flexible communication skills. A clear meeting agenda helps groups allocate time and stay focused on relevant priorities. Although challenges are inherent in international teams, shared goals can improve collaboration across departments. Expressions like 'global approach', 'invest a response', and 'key component' are useful because they allow professionals to summarize decisions, ask follow-up questions, and reduce misunderstandings before a project moves forward. Companies that invest in language training frequently report smoother negotiations and stronger relationships with overseas partners. As a result, communication training is no longer optional for ambitious professionals in competitive industries.

中文翻譯：在今日全球職場中，專業人士必須跨文化與跨時區清楚溝通。團隊成員常在管理繁忙行程的同時合作專案。報告想法時，說話者應以相關例子傳達訊息。討論中保持自信並建設性回應回饋也至關重要。主管可能協商截止日期或資源，因此員工需要有效的溝通技巧。清楚的會議議程有助團隊分配時間並保持專注。雖然國際團隊挑戰固有，共同目標能促進合作。因此，投資語言培訓的公司常見團隊合作與客戶關係的顯著改善。

跟讀練習（3 句）

第 1 句

In today's global workplace, professionals must communicate clearly across cultures and time zones.

發音提示：注意功能詞的連音與重音位置，先慢速再加速。

跟讀步驟：先聽一次，再逐句跟讀，最後不看文字朗讀。

第 2 句

Team members often collaborate on projects while managing demanding schedules, so precise language matters.

發音提示：留意 and、to、of 等虛詞的弱化發音。

跟讀步驟：先慢速跟讀兩遍，再加速至正常語速。

第 3 句

Today's vocabulary introduces expressions such as 'dependency for writing', 'implication', 'negotiate', and 'conclusion in context'; each one can help learners explain work, travel, or cultural situations with more confidence.

發音提示：句尾語調略下降，表示陳述句結束。

跟讀步驟：分段練習後，最後整句連貫朗讀一次。

TOEFL 技能訓練

請依今日所學完成一題 TOEFL 導向練習，口說 45 秒或寫 3–4 句。

題目：How would you use 'dependency for writing' in a TOEFL speaking answer about Social Communication Skills?

架構：I believe ___. One reason is that ___. For example, ___. As a result, ___.

範例：I believe daily practice is essential. One reason is that it builds dependency for writing over time. For example, I review vocabulary every morning before work. As a result, I feel more prepared for academic tasks.

每日測驗（含答案）

Q1. Which definition best matches 'dependency for writing'?

  • A. 與「依賴」相關的常用片語
  • B. 含義
  • C. 協商
  • D. 與「結論」相關的常用片語

答案：A — 今日單字 dependency for writing 的解釋為「與「依賴」相關的常用片語」。

Q2. What is the main idea of today's reading?

  • A. Effective learning requires consistent, structured practice.
  • B. Cramming once a week is the best method.
  • C. Vocabulary lists alone guarantee a high score.
  • D. Test preparation should avoid speaking practice.

答案：A — 文章強調有限時間下，持續且結構化的練習才能帶來進步。

Q3. Which sentence uses today's grammar pattern correctly?

  • A. I like English. Because it is useful.
  • B. In my opinion, practice helps. One reason is that it builds fluency.
  • C. Practice good and fun.
  • D. English hard but I try.

答案：B — 選項 B 正確運用 In my opinion... One reason is that... 句型。

祝學習順利！明日 09:00 將寄送下一課。
